data.title: MiNK Therapeutics Reports Phase II Data on Immune Reprogramming and Durable Survival in PD-1 Refractory Gastroesophageal Cancer
data.description: On April 17, 2026, MiNK Therapeutics, Inc. announced data from a Phase II trial at Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center. The study evaluated agenT-797, MiNK’s allo-iNKT cell therapy, in combination with botensilimab (BOT) and balstilimab (BAL), ramucirumab, and paclitaxel in patients with advanced PD-1 refractory gastroesophageal adenocarcinoma. This trial took place at the American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting in San Diego, CA. MiNK Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focusing on allogeneic invariant natural killer T (allo-iNKT) cell therapies for immune-mediated diseases and cancer.

data.title: Creao AI Raises $10M to Build the Platform Where One Person Does the Work of a Team
data.description: In Cupertino, California, Creao AI is taking a unique approach in the AI industry by focusing on improving the operational loop rather than just the model. The startup recently secured a significant $10 million investment in a funding round led by Prosperity7 Ventures, the $3 billion venturing fund of Aramco Ventures. This investment brings Creao AI's total funding to $25 million, accumulated across three rounds in less than a year. The core belief driving this startup is that the true challenge in the AI sector lies not in intelligence but in bridging the gap between a chatbot merely answering queries and an agent autonomously carrying out tasks while users are away.

data.title: Accent Therapeutics Presents Data Reinforcing Therapeutic Potential of Novel KIF18A Inhibitor, ATX-295, at the 2026 American Association for Cancer Research Annual Meeting
data.description: Promising results have been shown in preclinical trials for ATX-295, a leading KIF18A inhibitor, indicating strong and long-lasting anti-cancer effects. The data reveals this potential best-in-class drug's effectiveness in multiple chromosomally unstable cancer models. Conducted in LEXINGTON, Mass., these findings were released on April 17, 2026. Accent Therapeutics, a biopharmaceutical firm in the clinical stage, spearheaded this research effort. These results are significant for the future of cancer treatment, showcasing the potential of ATX-295 in combatting this disease.

data.title: Nested Therapeutics Reports Initial Encouraging Clinical Activity and Favorable Tolerability of NST-628, a Brain-Penetrant Pan-RAF/MEK Molecular Glue, at AACR 2026
data.description: A recommended dose treatment has shown promising results in advanced/metastatic NRAS and BRAF Class II/III melanoma patients, with a 38% response rate and 85% disease control rate. This approach has also demonstrated responses in various RAS/MAPK-driven tumors and initial signs of activity in the central nervous system (CNS). The study involved around 8,000 NRAS and BRAF patients who had not responded to standard therapies.

data.title: Lunit to Present Six AI Studies at AACR 2026 Highlighting Advances in Precision Oncology and Real-World Clinical Application
data.description: At the AACR 2026 conference, Lunit showcased the impact of AI-based biomarkers in enhancing clinical processes and analyzing tumor microenvironment spatial aspects missed by traditional methods. These advancements aim to streamline workflows, provide comprehensive insights, and aid in treatment decisions. The event took place in Seoul and highlighted the potential of AI in revolutionizing healthcare practices.

data.title: Bitcoin Surges To $77,000 As Market Flips To Greed On Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Jumping 3%
data.description: Bitcoin reached a high of $77,000, while nearly $1 billion worth of short positions were liquidated on Friday. The current cryptocurrency prices are Bitcoin at $77,245.02, Ethereum at $2,422.90, Solana at $89.21, XRP at $1.47, Dogecoin at $0.1003, and Shiba Inu at $0.056379. Data from Coinglass indicates that 182,798 traders were liquidated within the last 24 hours, amounting to $818.97 million. Additionally, SoSoValue data shows net inflows of $26.05 million from spot Bitcoin ETFs and $18.02 million from spot Ethereum ETFs on Thursday. Some of the top gainers in the past day were RaveDAO and Ethena. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Immunitas Presents Phase 1/2a Data Highlighting Anti-Tumor Activity of Novel Immunotherapy IMT-009 at AACR 2026 Annual Meeting
data.description: The drug IMT-009 showed good tolerance both on its own and when combined with fruquintinib, displaying initial indications of effectiveness against tumors in patients who had received extensive prior treatment. Research indicates that biomarkers linked to tertiary lymphoid structures could potentially assist in pinpointing the most suitable patients for this treatment.

data.title: Soley Therapeutics Presents Preclinical Data Demonstrating Selective Anti-Tumor Activity of STX-6398, a First-in-Class CKAP2 Modulator, at AACR 2026
data.description: A research company based in South San Francisco, California, recently showcased preclinical findings at the AACR 2026 conference. Soley Therapeutics revealed data on STX-6398, a pioneering CKAP2 modulator. The results highlighted the compound's targeted anti-tumor capabilities. This event marked a significant step in demonstrating the potential of STX-6398.

data.title: University of Maryland and American University Students Inspire Transportation Innovation in Maryland
data.description: In April 17, 2026, in College Park, Maryland, students from both the University of Maryland (UMD) and American University (AU) came together to assist with the transportation requirements of Maryland residents. This initiative involved students from various schools, especially the Robert H. Smith School of Business and Kogod School of Business.

data.title: AGIBOT Unveils New Generation of Embodied AI Robots and Models, Accelerating Real-World Deployment of Physical AI
data.description: On April 17, 2026 in Shanghai, AGIBOT, a renowned robotics company known for its expertise in embodied intelligence, revealed its latest innovations at the 2026 Partner Conference. The event showcased a new line of embodied AI products and foundational models, signifying a significant advancement towards widespread practical application.

data.title: Glaucoma Foundation Celebrates 42nd Anniversary - Honoree Pledges $5 Million Dollars for Glaucoma Research
data.description: In New York on April 17, 2026, a fundraiser event was held to commemorate the 42nd anniversary of the Glaucoma Foundation. The Annual Gala brought together 300 guests, including supporters and friends, to recognize philanthropy, advocacy, and artistry. The event successfully raised $520,000 to aid in the Foundation's efforts.

data.title: "It Makes Me Feel Like I'm Growing Younger and Stronger" - Gundry MD Phyto Collagen Complex Receives Rave Reviews Highlighting Benefits of Full-Body Collagen Support
data.description: Gundry MD® Phyto Collagen Complex™ has garnered praise from customers for its significant benefits. Users have noted improvements in strength, skin firmness, and overall resilience. The product has gained widespread acclaim, with many experiencing increased strength and mobility. The supplement has proven effective for numerous individuals, with noticeable enhancements reported. The positive feedback underscores the effectiveness of Gundry MD® Phyto Collagen Complex™, with users experiencing improvements in various aspects of their health and vitality.

data.title: PG&E Launches the PG&E PowerHouse -- An All-Electric Home Designed to Make Electrification Easier and More Affordable
data.description: In Oakland, California, on April 17, 2026, Pacific Gas and Electric Company (PG&E) revealed the PG&E PowerHouse, a model home and living lab designed to simplify electrification. The PowerHouse is a fully electric structure aimed at demonstrating the benefits of all-electric living. This initiative by PG&E seeks to showcase advanced technology solutions to promote a sustainable lifestyle.

data.title: Dynamite Integrates Biometric Cryptography and AI into its Wallet Product
data.description: VANCOUVER, BC, April 17, 2026 - Dynamite Blockchain Corp. (CSE: KAS) (OTC: CRYBF) has unveiled the new Dynamite Wallet, a groundbreaking product that transforms your facial features into your unique private key. This innovative development marks a significant step forward in blockchain technology.

data.title: University of Phoenix Leaders to Discuss Transfer Credit and Credit for Prior Learning at 111th AACRAO Annual Meeting
data.description: In Phoenix on April 17, 2026, sessions will be held to discuss transfer credit and credit for prior learning, along with a focus on compliance reporting and electronic data exchange. Leaders from the University of Phoenix are set to take part in the 111th Annual Meeting of the American Association. The event will delve into important topics related to education, with a particular emphasis on enhancing processes for recognizing student achievements. Stay tuned for insights and updates from this significant gathering.

data.title: PenFed Foundation for Military Heroes Celebration of Service Raises over $1.3 million to Empower Veterans
data.description: Recently, a special event took place in Tysons, Virginia on April 17, 2026, to recognize individuals who have committed themselves to serving others. The event was held in honor of the PenFed Foundation for Military Heroes, a prominent national nonprofit aiding veterans as they move from military service to achievement in civilian life. This foundation is dedicated to empowering and supporting veterans as they navigate this transitional period, contributing to their success post-service. Through their initiatives, the foundation positively impacts the lives of many veterans across the nation.
